The Reality

Your clients are already judging your English.

The Real Cost

When the pressure is on, you hesitate. And in that hesitation, an international client doesn't think "they're translating." They think "they're unsure."

You lose authority not because you lack expertise — but because your English doesn't carry it yet. Deals go to people who speak with certainty. That person should be you.

Why You're Still Stuck

You've already tried everything else.

AI tools. Language tutors. Online courses. None of them solved it. Here is why.

AI Tools
ChatGPT, Duolingo AI, Google Translate
✕ They answer whatever you ask — but you don't know what to ask
✕ No memory of your patterns. No structure. No progression.
✕ A tool is not a system. Using it randomly produces random results.
Language Tutors
Weekly sessions, grammar corrections, homework
✕ Available 2 hours a week. Your pressure moments don't wait for Tuesday.
✕ They correct your English. They don't rebuild how you perform in it.
✕ €100–€150 per hour, indefinitely, with no defined outcome.
Online Courses
Video libraries, PDFs, generic content
✕ Built for the average student. You are not average.
✕ You watch. You take notes. Nothing changes under pressure.
✕ No feedback. No adaptation. No accountability.
The Difference
Get Client Ready combines 100+ hours of real DACH executive coaching expertise with an intelligent platform that works around you — not the other way around. Available 24/7. Personalised from day one. Built to produce one result: authority in English.
The Pattern

The translation patterns that quietly cost you authority.

✕ "Can you tell me when this is ready?"
✓ "When can I expect this?"
✕ "I find your proposal very interesting."
✓ "This is exactly what we need."
✕ "We should maybe think about changing the strategy."
✓ "I want to change the strategy."
The Truth

More English lessons won't fix this.

✦
More vocabulary won't help.
You already have enough words. What breaks down is structure under pressure.
✦
Perfect grammar is not the goal.
International clients don't notice grammar. They notice hesitation. They notice when you shrink.
✦
You need to perform under pressure.
Fluency in calm moments means nothing if you freeze when a client pushes back or the deal is on the table.
Start Closing The Gap
Program Structure
6 weeks.
6 permanent shifts.
Six weeks. Six modules. One result: your words finally match your expertise.
Week 1
Diagnose
The platform runs your diagnostic. You complete real scenarios and the AI identifies your exact breakdown pattern — where your English loses power, and why. Everyone freezes for a different reason. You find yours on day one.
→
Week 2
Arm
12 high-performance sentence frameworks. The AI drills them through interactive exercises calibrated to your diagnostic results — so you are not practicing what you already know. You are building what you need.
→
Week 3
Articulate
The platform presents your own previous responses and shows you where you shortened, hedged or lost the thread. The AI helps you rewrite them — completely, powerfully — until nothing gets left on the table.
→
Week 4
Pressure-Test
Live scenario simulations. The AI plays the client, the board member, the difficult negotiator. It pushes back. It asks the unexpected. You respond in real time — and receive instant feedback on every answer.
→
Week 5
Command
The platform shifts from reactive to proactive drills. How to steer, redirect, disagree with authority and close without hesitation. The AI tracks your response patterns week-on-week and shows you the measurable shift in your confidence scores.
→
Week 6
Own It
The platform generates your personal communication playbook from six weeks of your own performance data — your patterns, your breakthroughs, your high-performance frameworks. Built by the AI. Built from you. Yours permanently.
→

The Platform

The first AI-powered
English performance
system for DACH executives.

Every executive has access to AI. Almost none know how to use it to build real authority in English. We built the system that does it for them — automatically, personally, 24/7.

⚡
Intelligent Real-Time Feedback
Every exercise you complete is analysed instantly. The platform identifies your specific breakdown patterns and responds with personalised coaching — not generic corrections. It adapts to you, not to a generic student profile.
🎯
Your Personal Progress Dashboard
You have your own private dashboard. Every module completed, every pattern identified, every improvement tracked — visible to you in real time. You always know exactly where you are and what comes next.
🔁
Interactive Modules & Scenario Practice
Quizzes, live scenarios, speaking prompts and written exercises — all inside the platform. Every module responds to your answers, not a fixed script. This is how you rehearse reality before it happens.
📊
Your Data. Your Playbook.
By Week 6, the system has collected enough data about your patterns, your strengths and your pressure points to generate your personal communication playbook — built entirely from your own performance data.

No video library. No static PDF. A system that learns you — and gets more precise the further you go.

Frequently asked
questions

No. If you can hold a business conversation in English, you are ready. This program is not for beginners — it is for professionals who already function in English but lose authority the moment pressure enters the room. You have the language. This system teaches you to perform with it.

20 to 40 minutes per session. The program was built for executives who cannot afford long study days. What it requires is not time — it is consistency. Show up to each module. Do the work. The system is designed to produce results within that constraint.

A tutor corrects your grammar. This program rebuilds how you perform under pressure. Most DACH executives who come here have already worked with tutors, taken courses, or studied for years. Their English is functional. What they are missing is authority — the ability to lead a room, hold their ground, and close in English. That is what this system delivers.

Yes — and this is precisely the gap this program was built for. Conversational English gets you through small talk. Executive English gets you through a negotiation, an unexpected question, a presentation that goes off-script. Most DACH professionals are fluent in one and not the other. This program closes that gap.

Every session is built around the real situations you are currently facing — specific calls, negotiations, presentations or client relationships. We identify your personal breakdown patterns, work through them with targeted practice, and build your communication playbook around your industry and your pressure points. Sessions are online and recorded.

By week six, you will have a personal communication playbook, a set of sentence structures that work automatically under pressure, and direct experience practicing the exact scenarios that used to cost you authority. The shift is not just in how you speak — it is in how you show up. Clients notice. Rooms notice. You will notice it first.

The program runs from €790 to €3,490 depending on the tier you choose. There is no blanket refund policy — this is a high-commitment program that asks for your full engagement in return for a real result. If you have specific questions before purchasing, write to [email protected]. Every message is answered personally by Bettina, CEO of Entropy Breakers.
